// ===== REACT COMPONENT MIGRATION =====
// This accesses Firebase through your React app's components

console.log('🔍 Looking for Firebase in React components...');

// Method 1: Try to find Firebase in React DevTools
function findFirebaseInReact() {
  // Check if React DevTools is available
  if (window.__REACT_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__) {
    console.log('✅ React DevTools found');
    
    // Try to get the root fiber
    const hook = window.__REACT_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__;
    const renderers = hook.renderers || [];
    
    for (let renderer of renderers) {
      const fiberRoot = renderer.currentContainer;
      if (fiberRoot && fiberRoot.current) {
        console.log('✅ React fiber root found');
        
        // Try to find a component that might have Firebase
        const searchForFirebase = (fiber) => {
          // Check memoizedState for Firebase
          if (fiber.memoizedState) {
            const state = fiber.memoizedState;
            if (state.memoizedState && state.memoizedState.db) {
              return state.memoizedState.db;
            }
            if (state.memoizedState && state.memoizedState.firebase) {
              return state.memoizedState.firebase.firestore();
            }
          }
          
          // Check child
          if (fiber.child) {
            const result = searchForFirebase(fiber.child);
            if (result) return result;
          }
          
          // Check sibling
          if (fiber.sibling) {
            const result = searchForFirebase(fiber.sibling);
            if (result) return result;
          }
          
          return null;
        };
        
        const db = searchForFirebase(fiberRoot.current);
        if (db) {
          console.log('✅ Found Firebase in React components!');
          return db;
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  return null;
}

// Method 2: Try to access through imports (if possible)
function findFirebaseInImports() {
  // Try to check if we can access modules
  try {
    // This might not work in console, but let's try
    const modules = window.__webpack_require__ || window.webpackJsonp;
    if (modules) {
      console.log('✅ Webpack modules found');
      // Search for firebase in modules
      for (let key in modules) {
        if (modules[key] && modules[key].exports) {
          const exports = modules[key].exports;
          if (exports.default && exports.default.firestore) {
            console.log('✅ Found Firebase in webpack modules');
            return exports.default.firestore();
          }
        }
      }
    }
  } catch (e) {
    console.log('❌ Cannot access webpack modules');
  }
  
  return null;
}

// Try both methods
let db = findFirebaseInReact();
if (!db) {
  db = findFirebaseInImports();
}

if (db) {
  console.log('✅ Firebase found! Running migration...');
  
  // Run migration
  (async function() {
    try {
      const { collection, getDocs, doc, updateDoc, query, where, writeBatch } = db.constructor.prototype;
      
      const studentsSnapshot = await getDocs.call(db, query(collection(db, 'users'), where('role', '==', 'student')));
      const students = [];
      studentsSnapshot.forEach(doc => students.push({ id: doc.id, ref: doc.ref, ...doc.data() }));
      
      console.log(`📊 Found ${students.length} students`);
      
      if (students.length === 0) {
        console.log('❌ No students found');
        return;
      }
      
      const batch = writeBatch.call(db, db);
      let processed = 0;
      let skipped = 0;
      
      for (const student of students) {
        if (!student.referenceId || !student.referenceId.startsWith('STU-')) {
          const refId = 'STU-' + student.id.slice(-6).toUpperCase();
          batch.update(student.ref, { 
            referenceId: refId, 
            qrGeneratedAt: new Date() 
          });
          console.log('✅ ' + (student.email || student.id) + ' -> ' + refId);
          processed++;
        } else {
          console.log('⏭️  Skipping ' + (student.email || student.id) + ' - has ref: ' + student.referenceId);
          skipped++;
        }
      }
      
      await batch.commit();
      console.log('🎉 Migration complete!');
      console.log('✅ Updated: ' + processed + ' students');
      console.log('⏭️  Skipped: ' + skipped + ' students');
      
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('❌ Migration failed:', error);
    }
  })();
  
} else {
  console.log('❌ Firebase not found in React components');
  console.log('📝 ALTERNATIVE: Create a temporary migration page');
  console.log('');
  console.log('Since console access is limited, let me suggest an alternative:');
  console.log('1. Create a temporary admin page in your app');
  console.log('2. Add a button that runs the migration');
  console.log('3. This will have proper Firebase access');
  console.log('');
  console.log('Would you like me to create a temporary migration page for you?');
}

// ===== END OF SCRIPT =====
